mapper.select: SELECT tk.kkomi_no, tk.kkomi_lev, tk.kkomi_Exp FROM tbl_kkomi tk WHERE #{userNo} = tk.user_no

SELECT NVL(tk.kkomi_no,1) as kkomi_no, NVL(tk.kkomi_lev, 1) as kkomi_lev, NVL(tk.kkomi_Exp,0) as kkomi_exp, NVL(tc.total_Amount,0) as point, NVL(r.my_Ranking, 0) as my_ranking FROM tbl_user tu LEFT JOIN tbl_kkomi tk on tu.user_no = tk.user_no LEFT JOIN tbl_currency tc on (tu.user_no = tc.user_no and tc.currency_id = 1) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_No, RANK() OVER(ORDER BY tr.Rank_Point DESC) as my_ranking FROM tbl_ranking tr where tr.rank_season_info = TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(sysdate,'YYYYMM')) ) r on tu.user_no = r.user_no WHERE tu.user_no = #{userNo}

SELECT * FROM (SELECT tr.user_no, tr.Rank_point as rank_Point, DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY tr.Rank_Point DESC) AS ranking, tu.user_Nickname, tk.kkomi_Lev FROM TBL_RANKING tr JOIN TBL_USER tu ON tr.user_no = tu.user_no JOIN TBL_KKOMI tk ON tr.user_no = tk.user_no WHERE tr.rank_season_info = TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(sysdate,'YYYYMM'))) r WHERE r.ranking <= 10 or r.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY R.ranking

SELECT tr.user_no, tr.Rank_point, DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY tr.Rank_Point DESC) AS ranking, tnu.user_Nickname, tk.kkomi_Lev FROM TBL_RANKING tr JOIN TBL_NORMAL_USER tnu ON tr.user_no = tnu.user_no JOIN TBL_KKOMI tk ON tr.user_no = tk.user_no WHERE tr.rank_season_info = TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(sysdate,'YYYYMM')) AND tr.user_no = #{userNo}
SELECT tr.user_no, tr.rank_point, tr.rank_season_info FROM TBL_RANKING tr WHERE tr.rank_season_info = TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(sysdate,'YYYYMM')) AND tr.user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TBL_RANKING tr USING( SELECT #{userNo} as user_no, TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(sysdate,'YYYYMM')) as curr_season FROM DUAL) src ON (src.user_no = tr.user_no and src.curr_season = tr.Rank_Season_Info) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET tr.rank_Point = tr.rank_Point + #{rankPoint} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (user_no, rank_point, rank_season_info) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{rankPoint}, src.curr_season)
mapper.select: SELECT tm.MISSION_ID AS mission_id, tm.MISSION_NAME AS mission_name, tm.MISSION_DETAIL AS mission_detail, tm.MISSION_NEEDCOUNT AS mission_need_count, tm.MISSION_TYPE AS mission_type , tm.REWARD_ID AS reward_id, NVL(tum.USER_NO,#{userNo}) AS user_no, NVL(tum.MISSION_IS_REWARD,0) AS mission_is_reward, tum.MISSION_LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS mission_last_update_date, NVL(tum.MISSION_COUNT,0) AS mission_curr_count FROM tbl_mission tm LEFT JOIN TBL_USER_MISSION tum ON tm.MISSION_ID = tum.MISSION_ID AND tum.USER_NO = #{userNo}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TBL_USER_MISSION tm USING ( SELECT #{userNo} AS user_no FROM DUAL ) src ON (tm.user_no = src.user_no) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET mission_count = #{missionCurrCount}, mission_is_reward = #{missionIsReward}, mission_last_update_date = #{missionLastUpdateDate} WHNE NOT MATHCED THEN INSERT(mission_id, user_no, mission_count,mission_is_reward, mission_last_update_date) VALUES(#{missionId}, #{userNo}, #{missionCount}, #{missionIsReward}, #{missionLastUpdateDate)
